infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your camera so you can take photos at the event and share them with the host. For example, you can snap a photo during the celebration and upload it to the shared event gallery. The camera is also needed for scanning QR codes to quickly join the event and access its features.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photo library so you can select existing photos from your device and upload them to the shared event gallery. For example, you can choose a photo you took at the event and share it with the host.

plugins.cameraPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your camera so you can take photos at the event and share them with the host. For example, you can snap a photo during the celebration and upload it to the event gallery. The camera is also needed for scanning QR codes to quickly join the event and access its features.

plugins.photosPermission: $(PRODUCT_NAME) needs access to your photo library so you can select existing photos from your device and upload them to the event gallery. For example, you can choose a photo you took at the event and share it with the host.
